jsonLd.title: Junior SEO Specialist at Wrogn
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Wrogn! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Wrogn:
Wrogn is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wrogn!
